responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Fix the production home screen to show real JV deals, reels, and remove the "IVX Test" card with $NaN, plus the already-completed QR code flow fix and Expo tunnel restoration.

## Constraints & Preferences
- React Native (Expo), NOT Swift — user explicitly rejected iOS native
- No hardcoded arrays, static JSON, mock files, or local device storage for tasks
- PRODUCTION_VERIFIED display requires five-point gate: real commit SHA, real deployment ID, health HTTP 200, running commit match, QA evidence
- Forbidden evidence values: AUTO-GENERATED, UNKNOWN, PENDING, PLACEHOLDER, MOCK, NARRATIVE, GENERATED, SIMULATED, ESTIMATED, ASSUMED
- Destructive tasks (mass data deletion) require explicit owner approval — never auto-executed
- GitHub repo `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` is PUBLIC, pushed via Rork-managed GitHub App binding (all `ghp_` tokens revoked)
- Backend: `https://ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com` (Render), Supabase: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co`
- QR image URLs must NEVER be opened in browser — must be rendered as images inside the app
- No secrets/tokens/passwords in QR payloads
- Expo tunnel processes die between workspace sessions — user must open URL quickly or request restart
- Public content (featured properties, JV deals, reels) must load without owner login
- One canonical visibility rule across app and landing page — no mock/test data in production

## Progress
### Done
- **QR fix v2 fully deployed and verified live** — commit `168c0f21fdb9a48d3583f16cecaff53e39dd309f` pushed to main, Render boot `2026-07-11T05:44:03.066Z`, health 200, running commit matches, web bundle `entry-2afe146a…` contains all markers (`qr-viewer-modal`, `attachment-tap-qr-intercept` ×2, `forbidden-host`, `expired-signed-url`, `invalid-protocol`, `QRFlow`, `Back to IVX`); 287/287 tests pass, typecheck clean
- **QR encoder replaced** — hand-rolled `expo/lib/qr-generator.ts` was producing matrices jsQR could not decode (returned NULL on every code); replaced internals with `qrcode-generator` library (EC level M, auto version) behind same `generateQRMatrix` interface; added `jsqr` + `qrcode-generator` deps
- **QR tests added** — `expo/__tests__/qr-decode.test.ts` (4 tests: renders matrix to RGBA, decodes with independent jsQR, asserts decoded===destination), `expo/__tests__/qr-destination-validation.test.ts` (12 tests: validation + sensitive payload); total 26 QR-specific tests
- **QR fix v1 already live** — commit `482fa472`, `api.qrserver.com` never passed to `Linking.openURL`/`window.open`
- **Destructive delete task REJECTED** — `task-d8e11135…` status `REJECTED_UNSAFE`, all production data preserved
- **Task ledger verified** — 60 total, 45 COMPLETED, 14 CANCELLED_OBSOLETE, 1 REJECTED_UNSAFE, 0 pending, 0 undeployed code; workspace diff vs remote is empty (only audit logs differ)
- **Expo tunnel restored** — old `neat-bullfrog-49.loca.lt` returned 503 (dead); new tunnel `exp://9ni2nsa-anonymous-8081.exp.direct` created and verified: manifest 200, bundle 200 (41.6 MB, 4,240 modules), Metro port 8081 PID 1622; Watchman binary disabled (was crashing fatally); Expo Go compatible (no unsupported native modules); SDK 54, RN 0.81.5, expo-router ~6.0.24
- **Home screen data sources audited**:
  - `jv_deals` table: 3 published deals (Perez Residence `perez-residence-001`, Casa Rosario `casa-rosario-001`, One Stop Constructors `JV-202603-5190`), all `status=active`, `published=true`
  - `properties` table: 1 row "IVX Test" `a1b2c3d4`, `status=coming_soon`, `price=undefined` → causes $NaN
  - `jv_deal_reels` table: 1 row (Casa Rosario tour, `published=true`, `visibility=public`, valid video URL)
  - Public API `https://ivxholding.com/api/published-jv-deals` returns 3 deals (HTTP 200)
  - `jv_deal_media`: 24 rows (HTTP 206, content-range 0-0/24)
- **Root causes identified for home screen failure**:
  1. JV deals fetch timeout in `lib/parse-deal.ts` resolves with `{ deals: [] }` instead of rejecting — React Query caches empty as SUCCESS → "No JV deals available yet" with no error/retry
  2. No Reels section component exists anywhere in `app/` — reels data available but never queried or displayed
  3. "IVX Test" property in `properties` table has undefined price → formatters produce "$NaN"
  4. `lib/formatters.ts` has no NaN/undefined guards — all formatters pass raw values to Intl.NumberFormat

### In Progress
- **Home screen fix — code partially written, not yet integrated/tested/committed/deployed**:
  - Created `expo/lib/home-content-guards.ts` — `toFiniteNumber()`, `formatPercentSafe()`, `isQuarantinedTestProperty()` (detects test/mock names + invalid financials), `isPublicReelRow()`, `mapReelRow()`, `mapReelRows()` (dedupes, sorts, drops bad rows)
  - Edited `expo/lib/formatters.ts` — added `safeAmount()` guard to all 8 formatters (formatCurrency, formatCurrencyWithDecimals, formatNumber, formatCompactNumber, formatCurrencyCompact, formatDollar, formatDollarWhole, formatDollarCompact) — never renders $NaN
  - Edited `expo/lib/parse-deal.ts` — timeout now rejects instead of resolving empty (so React Query retries with error state)
  - Created `expo/components/HomeReelsSection.tsx` — full reels section: queries `jv_deal_reels` via Supabase, loading/error/retry states, horizontal scroll of thumbnail cards, video player modal with `expo-av`, project linkage, dedup via `mapReelRows`
  - **Still needs**: integrate `HomeReelsSection` into `app/(tabs)/(home)/home.tsx`, filter "IVX Test" from properties using `isQuarantinedTestProperty`, add tests for home-content-guards, typecheck, test, commit, push, deploy, verify live

### Blocked
- (none)

## Key Decisions
- QR encoder replaced with `qrcode-generator` library because hand-rolled encoder produced non-spec matrices unreadable by standard decoders (jsQR returned NULL on every code)
- JV deals fetch timeout must REJECT not resolve-empty — resolved-empty is cached by React Query as SUCCESS, hiding real data behind a permanent "No JV deals" state with no retry
- Reels section uses same `jv_deal_reels` Supabase table as landing page (same IDs, same CDN URLs) — one source of truth
- "IVX Test" property quarantined by name pattern + invalid financials check, not by ID — prevents future test records from appearing
- All formatters guarded with `safeAmount()` — coerces NaN/Infinity/null/undefined to 0 before Intl.NumberFormat
- Watchman binary disabled (moved to `.disabled`) because it crashes fatally on start in this sandbox, blocking Metro file crawl
- Expo tunnel URLs are ephemeral — die when workspace session ends; user must open quickly or request restart

## Next Steps
1. Integrate `HomeReelsSection` into `app/(tabs)/(home)/home.tsx` (import, place between Coming Soon and Owner Login sections)
2. Filter properties on home screen using `isQuarantinedTestProperty()` to remove "IVX Test" card
3. Add `expo/__tests__/home-content-guards.test.ts` — test `toFiniteNumber`, `formatPercentSafe`, `isQuarantinedTestProperty`, `mapReelRows` (including NaN, test names, duplicate IDs, bad URLs)
4. Run typecheck (`tsc --noEmit`) on all modified files
5. Run all tests (existing 287 + new home-content-guards tests)
6. Commit home screen fix, push to GitHub main
7. Wait for Render autodeploy, verify health endpoint shows new commit
8. Verify live app shows: 3 featured properties, 3 JV deals, 1 reel, no "IVX Test", no $NaN
9. Return full evidence block with all 23 QA fields from the urgent fix spec

## Critical Context
- **GitHub HEAD**: `168c0f21fdb9a48d3583f16cecaff53e39dd309f` on `main` (QR fix v2)
- **Render running commit**: `168c0f21fdb9a48d3583f16cecaff53e39dd309f` (health 200, verified)
- **Workspace has uncommitted home screen fix changes** — new: `expo/lib/home-content-guards.ts`, `expo/components/HomeReelsSection.tsx`; modified: `expo/lib/formatters.ts`, `expo/lib/parse-deal.ts`
- **Expo tunnel**: `exp://9ni2nsa-anonymous-8081.exp.direct` — may be dead if session ended; restart with `bunx expo start --tunnel --port 8081` from `expo/` dir
- **Supabase anon key fallback** hardcoded in `expo/lib/supabase.ts` (public anon key, not a secret) — app works without `.env`
- **Home screen file**: `expo/app/(tabs)/(home)/home.tsx` (2,133 lines) — `JVDealsCarousel` at line 921, `QuickInvestSection` at 1013, Coming Soon at 1751, Owner Login at 1763
- **`properties` table schema**: `id,name,location,city,country,images,price_per_share,total_shares,available_shares,min_investment,target_raise,current_raise,yield,cap_rate,irr,occupancy,property_type,status,risk_level,description,highlights,documents,distributions,price_history,closing_date,created_at,updated_at`
- **`jv_deals` table has `published` column (not `is_published`)**, `jv_deal_reels` has `project_id` (not `deal_id`)
- **`expo-av`** is installed (`~16.0.8`) for video playback in reels

## Relevant Files
- `expo/lib/home-content-guards.ts` — NEW: pure guards for NaN, test properties, reel mapping/dedup
- `expo/components/HomeReelsSection.tsx` — NEW: reels section with Supabase query, loading/error/retry, video player modal
- `expo/lib/formatters.ts` — MODIFIED: all 8 formatters guarded with `safeAmount()` against NaN/undefined
- `expo/lib/parse-deal.ts` — MODIFIED: JV deals fetch timeout now rejects instead of resolving empty (line ~459)
- `expo/app/(tabs)/(home)/home.tsx` — NEEDS MODIFICATION: integrate HomeReelsSection, filter IVX Test from properties
- `expo/lib/qr-generator.ts` — replaced with `qrcode-generator` library wrapper (same `generateQRMatrix` interface)
- `expo/lib/qr-url.ts` — QR URL detection, destination extraction, `validateDestinationUrl()`, `containsSensitivePayload()`
- `expo/components/QRViewerModal.tsx` — in-app QR viewer modal with local rendering, validation, double-tap guard
- `expo/components/QRCodeView.tsx` — local SVG QR renderer using `generateQRMatrix`
- `expo/lib/canonical-deals.ts` — canonical deal fetching from public API + Supabase, `PUBLISHED_STATUSES = ['active','published','live']`
- `expo/lib/public-api.ts` — `PUBLIC_LANDING_BASE_URL = 'https://ivxholding.com'`, `getPublishedDealsReadUrls()`
- `expo/lib/supabase.ts` — Supabase client with hardcoded fallback URL + anon key (public, not secret)
- `expo/lib/published-deal-card-model.ts` — `mapDealToCardModel()` maps raw jv_deals rows to card model
- `expo/components/PropertyCard.tsx` — property card component (full + compact variants)
- `expo/__tests__/qr-decode.test.ts` — 4 decode-match tests using jsQR
- `expo/__tests__/qr-destination-validation.test.ts` — 12 validation + sensitive payload tests
- `backend/services/ivx-canonical-task-store.ts` — canonical task store (deployed)
- `logs/audit/task-orchestrator/` — 60 task directories, all resolved
